testcase.name: Services Management - Validation Flows warns or sanitizes forbidden characters in service name
testcase.classname: warns or sanitizes forbidden characters in service name

failure.message: expected '' to equal 'The name can be any string containing characters, letters, numbers, or the following characters: ., -, _, or ~. Do not use spaces.'

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '' to equal 'The name can be any string containing characters, letters, numbers, or the following characters: ., -, _, or ~. Do not use spaces.' at Context.eval (webpack://kong-ui-test/./cypress/support/utils/elementUtils.js:50:39) at getRet (http://localhost:8002/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122806:20) at tryCatcher (http://localhost:8002/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:1777:23) at Promise.attempt.Promise.try (http://localhost:8002/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:4285:29) at Context.thenFn (http://localhost:8002/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:122817:66) at Context.then (http://localhost:8002/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:123068:21)

testcase.name: Services Management - Validation Flows validates URL with spaces or control characters
testcase.classname: validates URL with spaces or control characters

failure.message:
`cy.scrollIntoView()` can only be used to scroll to 1 element, you tried to scroll to 2 elements.
https://on.cypress.io/scrollintoview

testcase.failure:
CypressError: `cy.scrollIntoView()` can only be used to scroll to 1 element, you tried to scroll to 2 elements.
